title: oxalis refracta
intro: Oxalis refracta, also known as wood sorrel, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the oxalis genus. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems due to its high levels of oxalic acid and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Oxalis refracta include its ability to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, diarrhea, and eczema, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Oxalis refracta can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
